# Custom Agents

This repository includes a workspace-specific custom agent for ElevateFlow.

## Available agent

- `elevateflow`
  - Description: Workspace-specific developer assistant for the ElevateFlow repository.
  - Location: `.github/agents/elevateflow.agent.md`
  - Use when: fixing app routing, package scripts, backend routes, or Next.js/Supabase integration issues.

## How to use

Invoke the `elevateflow` agent when you want focused assistance on this repository's code and configuration.
